# Fixture for NamesList.txt — Latin block samples covering every marker type.
# Format mirrors the real Unicode NamesList.txt:
#   cp; Name            ← column-0 header (new NamesListEntry)
#     → U+XXXX note    ← see-also cross-reference
#     × U+XXXX U+YYYY note (rendered: Á)  ← typical usage sequence
#     ≡ U+XXXX note    ← compatibility equivalent
#     = alias text     ← informal alias
#     * footnote text  ← explanatory note
#     % instruction    ← DROPPED (instructional)
#     ~ heading        ← DROPPED (table-of-contents)
@@ Latin
~ Basic Latin, p. 1
0041;LATIN CAPITAL LETTER A
  = capital A
  × U+0041 U+0301 Á (rendered: Á)
  → U+0391 Greek capital alpha
  → U+FF21 fullwidth capital A
  → U+1D00 small capital A
  * capital letter form used as a quantifier in mathematics
  * derived from Phoenician aleph

0042;LATIN CAPITAL LETTER B
  ≡ U+0042 compatibility duplicate
  * legacy typography variant

% This line is instructional and must be dropped
~ This is a section heading that must be dropped

# A trailing codepoint with no annotations:
0043;LATIN CAPITAL LETTER C
